prompt:
Use case: stylized-concept
Asset type: combat card illustration
Primary request: a premium dark-fantasy card illustration for an original game called Blood Rogue showing the earth splitting open into a burning fault line beneath unseen enemies, with molten fire venting upward in a disciplined druidic pattern rather than random chaos.
Subject: one centered volcanic fissure tearing through dark ground, no full character body, no crowd scene.
Style/medium: painterly gothic dark fantasy, mature deckbuilder art.
Composition/framing: vertical 3:4 illustration, one dominant central rupture, dark edges, simple backdrop, readable at small size.
Lighting/mood: primal, eruptive, controlled, punishing.
Color palette: ember orange, char black, basalt gray, molten gold, smoke red.
Materials/textures: cracked earth, liquid fire, ash plume, glowing stone, cinder dust.
Constraints: no text, no logo, no frame, no watermark, no modern objects.
Avoid: no cartoon lava, no bright rainbow magic, no busy battlefield.
